decision: Stop and classify current webhook, replay store, Eve processing, and handset delivery as separate inconclusive dimensions.
nextStep: Obtain authenticated Sendblue account/webhook metadata, independent deployment identity, credential-hidden Upstash metadata, and separately authorized journey evidence.
evidenceRequired: Authenticated account and complete receive-webhook metadata with secrets and path/query data removed.
Independent app deployment/environment identity and credential-hidden Upstash database metadata.
Separate provider acceptance, Eve processing, and handset-delivery observations.
limitations: Historical HTTP 202 establishes accepted dispatch scheduling only.
nonClaims: No current webhook, replay-store, Eve-processing, handset-delivery, or Production health is established and no retry is justified.
rollbackRevocation: The provider owner restores the complete prior webhook inventory and revokes affected credential, webhook, routing, or replay material with immediate metadata readback.
